prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic portrait photograph of a young Indian woman seated indoors near a large window during golden hour. Frame as a close-up bust portrait in vertical square composition, with the subject turned slightly three-quarters toward the camera, shoulders relaxed, wearing a simple loose taupe beige linen kurta or blouse. Her long dark brown hair in a thick side braid falls over one shoulder, with a few soft loose strands catching the light. Cover the entire facial area with one centered opaque square privacy block in a warm medium-brown skin-tone color, while leaving the hair, ears, neck, clothing, and body visible. Use soft natural daylight from a side window on the left, warm golden sunlight outlining the hair and shoulder, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, muted beige interior background, subtle lens glow, realistic skin and fabric texture where visible, 85mm portrait lens look, cinematic color grading, calm intimate mood, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
